name: we-should-all-be-feminists
description: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie's powerful essay on why gender equality benefits everyone — examining gender socialization, workplace bias, and how to create change.
useCase: Understand feminism, how gender roles harm both men and women, and how to create a more equal society.
knownRisks: Short essay — depth is limited compared to full-length books
Some may disagree with the author's perspective
Cultural context of Nigeria may differ from readers' experiences
